label: Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence

node.label: Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence
node.definition: Multi-agent systems coordinate several specialized or peer agents through roles, protocols, shared memory, task allocation, and conflict resolution.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence is to connect Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration to downstream capabilities including Simulation, operations research & wargaming.
examples: substrate for Simulation, operations research & wargaming
combined with Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Multi-agent coordination, debate & markets, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration.

Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Workflow, cluster & job orchestration as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Graph-of-Thought & non-linear deliberation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence integrates Episodic memory as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
